hostIntro: This is Dis or Dat! I'm going to show you seven things, and you have to sort them into one of two categories. Today's categories: IKEA Product — or — Norse God. Some of these are going to feel uncomfortably similar.
hostCorrect: Excellent sorting! You clearly know your flat-pack furniture from your ancient deities.
hostWrong: Oof. Some of you got confused. KALLAX is where you store your records. ODIN is where you go after you die in battle. Different vibes.
hostTimeout: Time's up. For the record: KALLAX, EKTORP, MALM, and BILLY are IKEA. ODIN, BALDR, and FREYR are Norse gods. Yes, BILLY is the bookcase.

hostIntro: Pasta Shape. Or James Bond Villain. Seven items, two categories, zero room for error. Both involve twists, curves, and people who want to destroy you.
hostCorrect: You sorted pasta from supervillains like a pro. That's genuinely impressive and slightly concerning.
hostWrong: Some of these tripped you up? JAWS bites people. RIGATONI doesn't. That's how you tell them apart.
hostTimeout: Pasta: RIGATONI, ORECCHIETTE, CAVATAPPI, FARFALLE. Villains: JAWS, GOLDFINGER, BLOFELD. Both scary in different ways.

hostIntro: Katy Perry Song. Or Famous Hurricane. Both are forces of nature. Both have left a trail of destruction. Sort accordingly.
hostCorrect: Nicely done. You know your pop anthems from your natural disasters.
hostWrong: Look, HARVEY and IRMA are hurricanes. ROAR and FIREWORK are Katy Perry. Both equally powerful in their own way.
hostTimeout: Katy Perry: ROAR, FIREWORK, PEACOCK, DARK HORSE. Hurricanes: KATRINA, HARVEY, IRMA. The storms made more mess.

hostIntro: Real country. Or completely made up from a movie or TV show. Some of these real ones sound faker than the fake ones. That's the game.
hostCorrect: Excellent geography! You know your real nations from your fictional kingdoms.
hostWrong: DJIBOUTI is a real country in East Africa. WAKANDA is from Black Panther. We need to talk about your world knowledge.
hostTimeout: Real: LATVIA, BHUTAN, DJIBOUTI. Fictional: WAKANDA (Black Panther), NARNIA (Narnia), GENOVIA (Princess Diaries), AGRABAH (Aladdin).

hostIntro: Band Name. Or Medical Condition. This is the category that separates the music fans from the hypochondriacs. PHISH. SCABIES. STAIND. You'll figure it out.
hostCorrect: Fantastic. You know your rock bands from your dermatological issues.
hostWrong: SCABIES and SHINGLES are things you go to the doctor for. PHISH and TOOL are things you go to a concert for.
hostTimeout: Bands: PHISH, STAIND, BLUR, TOOL. Medical conditions: SCABIES, GOUT, SHINGLES. All equally unpleasant to deal with.

hostIntro: Classic Cocktail. Or Mario Kart Race Track. Both can ruin your evening if you're not careful. Sort them.
hostCorrect: You sorted the drinks from the death tracks. Impressive. Rainbow Road has claimed far more victims than any cocktail.
hostWrong: RAINBOW ROAD is the track that ends friendships. TOM COLLINS is a drink that starts conversations. These are different things.
hostTimeout: Cocktails: GIMLET, SIDECAR, TOM COLLINS, HIGHBALL. Tracks: RAINBOW ROAD, KOOPA CAPE, MUSHROOM GORGE. One will make you crash, the other will too.

hostIntro: Famous Philosopher. Or Artisan Cheese. Both will leave you questioning reality. The category: PLATO, BRIE, DESCARTES... take your time.
hostCorrect: You told your Kant from your cheese. That's not something most people can do. Well done.
hostWrong: BRIE and GOUDA go on a cheese board. KANT and PLATO go in a philosophy textbook. You might want to look into both.
hostTimeout: Philosophers: PLATO, DESCARTES, HUME, KANT. Cheeses: BRIE, GOUDA, HAVARTI. Yes, I said KANT and I'll say it again.

hostIntro: Taylor Swift Album. Or Physics Phenomenon. Both will make you feel things you don't fully understand. Sort them out.
hostCorrect: You know your Swifties from your scientists. Or maybe you're both. The Swifties are doing great.
hostWrong: ENTROPY is the tendency of systems to disorder. REPUTATION is Taylor Swift's sixth studio album. They're actually related, if you think about it.
hostTimeout: Swift albums: FOLKLORE, REPUTATION, 1989, MIDNIGHTS. Physics: ENTROPY, PARALLAX, OSMOSIS. Both are forces you can't fully control.
